headline: Defense Stocks Hit Pause As Trump's Pentagon Remakes Military Industrial Complex
summary: Fast-moving defense stocks have stalled. Depleted weapons supplies and Pentagon budget questions leave the sector's future unclear.

raw.headline: Defense Stocks Hit Pause As Trump's Pentagon Remakes Military Industrial Complex
raw.summary: Fast-moving defense stocks have stalled. Depleted weapons supplies and Pentagon budget questions leave the sector's future unclear.

headline: Northrop Grumman Secures Navy Contract for GQM-163A Target Support
summary: NOC wins a $100M Navy contract to support GQM-163A target production and launch ops, running through May 2031.

raw.headline: Northrop Grumman Secures Navy Contract for GQM-163A Target Support
raw.summary: NOC wins a $100M Navy contract to support GQM-163A target production and launch ops, running through May 2031.

headline: Top 5 Stocks That Will Profit From SpaceX’s NASA Launch Monopoly After Blue Origin’s Pad Collapse
summary: Blue Origin’s New Glenn pad will take a minimum of a year to rebuild after a hot fire test obliterated the company’s only launch infrastructure for the vehicle, marking the first pad explosion since the Soviet N1 rocket in 1969. NASA’s Artemis lunar rover ride just vaporized, SpaceX inherits the entire federal manifest by default, ... Top 5 Stocks That Will Profit From SpaceX’s NASA Launch Monopoly After Blue Origin’s Pad Collapse

headline: Apex Space CEO: We have become the go to spacecraft platform company
summary: Ian Cinnamon, Co Founder and CEO of Apex Space, says investor demand for space is accelerating as lower launch costs, defense programs and satellite proliferation drive growth across the industry.
